no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The escalation reachability fix is implemented and deadcode no longer reports any `internal/escalation` symbols, but `cd cli && go test ./...` is still red on pre-existing `cmd` failures unrelated to this bead. The current failures are `TestExecuteBeadContextBudgetFromConfig`, `TestWorkUsesProjectRootForNoWorkScan`, `TestInvokeExecuteBeadFromLoopParsesJSONAmidWarnings`, and several `execute_bead_e2e_routing` cases, all surfacing `excluding execute-bead cleanup metadata: exit status 128` or the separate default-library 404. Follow-up needs to repair the baseline command tests before this bead can be committed cleanly.
